nodes.context: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club based in Southern Ontario, founded in Hamilton in 1948. Operated three chapters in Ontario until 2014.
Long-time ally of the Original Red Devils MC; absorbed the Red Devils' three chapters in late 2014.
Major outlaw motorcycle club; the Original Red Devils had good relationships with them.

edges.context: The Original Red Devils patched over to Bacchus MC in late 2014, with all three chapters joining. Members sport a brotherhood patch indicating a lasting 1% bond.
The Original Red Devils had good relationships with the Hells Angels, according to crime reporter Peter Edwards.
